yeah suspend on my acer a150x works great i

2009-03-07 Leave a comment

Yeah!

“Suspend” on my acer a150x works great!

I need only to setup a swap partition of 1gb and set it on my kernel config.

OS: ubuntu 8.10   Kernel: 2.6.28.7

cu!
